title: linum tauricum subsp. linearifolium
intro: Linum tauricum subsp. linearifolium, also known as the Blue Flax, is a subspecies of the Linum tauricum plant, characterized by its linear and narrow leaves. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Linum tauricum subsp. linearifolium include reducing inflammation and improving skin health, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of various diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular issues. Herbal preparations of Linum tauricum subsp. linearifolium are typically made from its seeds or leaves, and can be taken as infusions, tinctures, or applied topically to the skin.
